subTitle.v: Duyệt đơn hàng bán: duyệt, hủy, bỏ duyệt...

query.text: exec FastBusiness$APV$SO$LoadApproval @@id, @@master, @@prime, @@partition, @@expression, @@extension, @@pageCount, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal, 'a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, 1, 0, '', 'status in(''1'', ''9'')', 1

declare @PrimeJoin nvarchar(4000), @PrimeFilter nvarchar(4000) select @PrimeJoin = 'left join ' + @@prime + '%Partition b on a.stt_rec = b.stt_rec' create table #a(stt_rec varchar(32), datetime4 datetime) exec FastBusiness$App$GetApprovalKey 2, @@id, @Status, '#a', @@admin, @@userID, @PrimeFilter output
if @$primeJoin <> '' select @PrimeJoin = @PrimeJoin + ' ' + @$primeJoin if @$primeFilter <> '' select @PrimeFilter = @PrimeFilter + case when @PrimeFilter <> '' then ' and ' else '' end + @$primeFilter
exec FastBusiness$App$Voucher$Finding @@id, @@master, @@prime, @@inquiry, @@partition, @@expression, @@increase, @@extension, @@refresh, @@pageIndex, @@pageCount, @@lastPage, @@lastCount, @@firstItem, @@lastItem, @@keyMaster, @@keyDetail, 'stt_rec', @@textList, @@textExternal, 'a left join dmkh b on a.ma_kh = b.ma_kh', @@textOrderBy, @@admin, @@userID, 1, @ngay_ct1, @ngay_ct2, @so_ct1, @so_ct2, '*', @user_id0, @ma_dvcs, default, default, default, default, default, default, 'a.', @PrimeJoin, @PrimeFilter
